title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 379.005 - Definitions
text:
379.005.  Definitions. — As used in this chapter, unless otherwise clearly indicated by the context, the following words mean:
  (1)  "Department", the department of commerce and insurance; and
  (2)  "Director", the director of the department of commerce and insurance.
(L. 2008 S.B. 788)
